aiSummary:
# Universal Tuya Zigbee GitHub Activity Summary

## New Device Requests
1. **Human Presence Sensor**  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ321C_fkzihax8`  
   - **Issue**: [Device Request - Human presence sensor - Wenzhou Wenzhi Automation](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1270)  
   - **Status**: Open  

2. **UFO-R11**  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3290_ot6ewjvmej`  
   - **Issue**: [Device Request - UFO-R11](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1331)  
   - **Status**: Open  

3. **Wenzhi Smart Human Presence Sensor & Relay**  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE204_clrdrnya`  
   - **Issue**: [Device Request - Wenzhi Smart Human Presence Sensor & Relay](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1142)  
   - **Status**: Open  

4. **Fingerbot Plus**  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v`  
   - **Issue**: [Device Request - Fingerbot Plus](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/869)  
   - **Status**: Open  

5. **Smart Knob Dimmer**  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_402vrq2i`  
   - **Issue**: [Device Request - Smart Knob Dimmer](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1349)  
   - **Status**: Open  

6. **Smart Switch**  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_xxxxx`  
   - **Issue**: [Device Request - Smart Switch](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/issues/1329)  
   - **Status**: Open  

## Existing Fingerprints Supported
- **Plug Energy Monitor**:  
  - `_TZ3210_w0qqde0g`  
  - `_TZ3210_xzhnra8x`  

- **Presence Sensor Radar**:  
  - `_TZ321C_fkzihaxe8`  
  - `_TZ321C_fkzihax8`  

- **IR Blaster/Remote**:  
  - `_TZ3290_ot6ewjvmejq5ekhl`  

- **Motion Sensor Radar**:  
  - `_TZE204_clrdrnya`  

- **Curtain Motor/Fingerbot**:  
  - `_TZ3210_j4pdtz9v`  

- **Button Wireless 4/Climate Sensor**:  
  - `_TZ3000_402vrq2i`  

- **Switch Temp Sensor**:  
  - `_TZ3218_7fiyo3kv`  

## Fingerprints from Forks to Integrate
- No new fingerprints from forks have been identified for integration.

## Pull Requests with Useful Changes
1. **PR #1350**: [Added TS110E driver](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1350)  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZ3210_ngqk6jia`, `_TZ3210_weaqkhab`  
   - **Status**: Open  

2. **PR #1253**: [Added 3 new devices](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1253)  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE200_pay2byax`, `_TZ3000_mrpevh8p`  
   - **Status**: Open  

3. **PR #1219**: [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1219)  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZ3000_gjrubzje`  
   - **Status**: Open  

4. **PR #1218**: [Update driver.compose.json](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1218)  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE204_dapwryy7`  
   - **Status**: Open  

5. **PR #1195**: [Add _TZE204_bjzrowv2](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1195)  
   - **Fingerprint**: `_TZE204_bjzrowv2`  
   - **Status**: Open  

6. **PR #1210**: [Addition of Garage Door Controller](https://github.com/JohanBendz/com.tuya.zigbee/pull/1210)  
   - **Fingerprints**: `_TZE204_lawxy9e2`, `_TZE204_nklqjk62`  
   - **Status**: Open  

This summary encapsulates the latest developments in the Universal Tuya Zigbee repository, focusing on device requests, existing support, and ongoing contributions.
